subject: HO-HO-HO
body:
Jeffrey - a quick <JEE> " thanks"  for so much as  remembering me on your 
Holiday list.  For real.
[.... but , hey , is it a hint , or did you forget to enclose the  card with 
plastic surgeon appt.  I should see in New York when we are  up there some 
time around Jan 6th - 11th - !!?? ] 
That &  it would certainly be nice to have a  little visit with you on the 
homefront , unless your plans require otherwise  .  I  wish for  what you want 
for yourself .
<and I might like a <jee> sweatshirt /polo to make me part  of the clan >    
OK ?  REALLY.
That is a super specialty item to me.
Hug , etc.
Marcia M.

body_html:
Jeffrey - a quick <JEE> " thanks"  for so much as remembering me on your Holiday list.  For real.
[.... but , hey , is it a hint , or did you forget to enclose the card with plastic surgeon appt.  I should see in New York when we are up there some time around Jan 6th - 11th - !!?? ]
That &  it would certainly be nice to have a little visit with you on the homefront , unless your plans require otherwise .  I  wish for  what you want for yourself .
<and I might like a <jee> sweatshirt /polo to make me part of the clan >    OK ?  REALLY.
That is a super specialty item to me.
Hug , etc.
Marcia M.
